subject: Release 5.1.2
commit_message:
Release 5.1.2

Release 5.1.2 to fix the clamp image

Issue-ID: CLAMP-949
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I5e4d950ad898ac1c2e0b45d1d3849db6f2c317f4

entries.message:
